title: Cirrus: Show names/versions of critical packages

comments.body:
The new output shows up in the CirrusCI WebUI for all the 'testing' tasks:

![screenshot](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/1183438/65969012-13036c80-e432-11e9-8e84-5b47ac64ae10.png)

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *cevich*, *mheon* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
